sourceMovie.title: Conclave
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Conclave (2024) as a drama theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The drama and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Juror #2
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Conclave clicked for you, Juror #2 (2024) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and thriller, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Conclave?
faq.answer: Try Juror #2, Miss Sloane, The Pelican Brief—each shares DNA with Conclave while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Conclave?
faq.answer: Conclave (2024) is best described as Drama, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Conclave worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.2/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
